fee_note: buy 0.15% + sell 0.25% = 0.40% RT. gross_ret=price only; net_ret=price-0.40%; pnl_port=NAV contrib after fees

definitions.gross_ret: Stock price return over hold (exit_close_last_held / entry_close_prev - 1). NO fee.
definitions.pnl_port: Contribution to portfolio NAV = sum(weight_t * stock_return_t) - fees on |delta weight| for this name during the trade. AFTER fees.
